name: Vaylantz Wakening - Solo Activation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＶＶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴァリアンツ＝ウェイク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ソロアクティベート
desc: Place 1 "Vaylantz" Pendulum Monster from your Deck in your Pendulum Zone. If a card is in a Field Zone: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Vaylantz" monster in your Main Monster Zone; move that monster you control to an adjacent (horizontal) Monster Zone. You can only use each effect of "Vaylantz Wakening - Solo Activation" once per turn.
eff: Place 1 "Vaylantz" Pendulum Monster from your Deck in your Pendulum Zone. If a card is in a Field Zone: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Vaylantz" monster in your Main Monster Zone; move that monster you control to an adjacent (horizontal) Monster Zone. You can only use each effect of "Vaylantz Wakening - Solo Activation" once per turn.

action: Places from Deck to Pendulum Zone
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
